name: Grune Bohnen Mit Dill (Grean Beans with Dill)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place frozen green beans in a saucepan with boiling water, bouillon cube, and dill.
2. Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Separate the beans using a fork.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes or until tender.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the beans.
6. Stir in butter and serve.
